tasks.subject: Task 1: Download-skip predicates in httpStatusPolicy.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add pure testable building blocks consumed by Tasks 2-3.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/httpStatusPolicy.ts (append section)
- Test: src/tests/httpStatusPolicy.download.test.ts (create)

**Verify:** node --import tsx --test src/tests/httpStatusPolicy.download.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/httpStatusPolicy.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/httpStatusPolicy.download.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "node --import tsx --test src/tests/httpStatusPolicy.download.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isDownloadError matches only Download is starting", "resolveSkipDownloads default true only false disables", "shouldSkipAsDownload = flag && isDownloadError", "pdfDatasetName prefers crawleeStorageName else domain"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire fast-fail skip into crawler (functions.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** errorHandler noRetry on download trigger, download-cancel preNav hook, failedRequestHandler records filtered_pdf + pdf-{domain} and returns early.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/functions.ts (import 28-36; errorHandler before 554; download branch after 561; preNav hook after 701)
- Test: src/tests/skipDownload.handler.test.ts (create)

**Verify:** npm run build && node --import tsx --test src/tests/skipDownload.handler.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/functions.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/skipDownload.handler.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && node --import tsx --test src/tests/skipDownload.handler.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["errorHandler noRetry on download trigger", "preNav download cancel hook gated by SKIP_DOWNLOADS", "failedRequestHandler filtered_pdf + pdf-domain early return", "SKIP_DOWNLOADS=false falls through"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Unify inline-PDF accounting in routes.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Content-Type guard increments filtered_pdf + writes pdf-{domain} before returning (inline PDFs tracked same as downloads).

**Files:**
- Modify: src/routes.ts:27 (import pdfDatasetName); src/routes.ts:313-319 (guard accounting)

**Verify:** npm run build && npm test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/routes.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["guard increments filtered_pdf + pdf-domain row", "independent of SKIP_DOWNLOADS", "build clean + suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Surface filtered_pdf in webhook payload (main.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose filtered_pdf in the crawl-complete webhook payload.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/main.ts (readStat after 991; payload field after 1016)

**Verify:** npm run build && npm test ; grep -n filtered_pdf src/main.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["filtered_pdf in readStat + payload", "build clean + suite green"]}
```
